case_title: VIJAY PATEL et al VS. JULIE SMITH et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE "UNSUCESSFUL SERVICE". FILED BY PLAINTIFF PATEL, VIJAY EDWARDS, ELAINE AS TO DEFENDANT SMITH, JULIE
CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO GREGORY SMITH BY COURT AT SMALL CLAIM HEARING OF JUN-25-2010 AT 3:30PM.
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, PARTIALLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $3,731.22 DEFICIT IS $44.59. AS TO DEFENDANT SMITH, JULIE
